summary: Ran the end-to-end parent -> manager children sync flow. Parent login works, Profile > Registered children > Add another child form fills correctly and shows correct age hint. However, clicking 'Save children' SILENTLY DROPS the newly added child (child never appears in local dlbc_players, parent.registeredChildren, dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> in Supabase, or the manager Members list). Existing children amu/john that were already in Supabase before this run DO show up on the manager Members list, confirming the roster-contrib aggregation path itself works — only the *addition* of a new child from Profile is broken. Primary user-facing bug ('parent-added child not visible to manager') is therefore NOT fully fixed for the ProfileTab.handleSaveChildren flow.

minor.issue: Non-manager (parent) user still hits 'new row violates row-level security policy for table app_state' when the client tries to ensure-sync dlbc_teams on page load. Console warning fires on every parent visit. RLS fix in supabase/app-data-setup.sql likely still restricts dlbc_teams writes to managers; syncKeyToRemote/ensureAppStateKeySynced should skip dlbc_teams for non-managers just like it does for dlbc_players (route to contribution row), or the client should not attempt to sync teams as a member.

ui_bugs.issue: Newly-added registered child is silently dropped on Save Children click. Reproduced 2x: filled Name='QAChild<n>', DOB=2012-05-15 (age 14), Gender=Male in the third child row; UI showed 'Age: 14 years old'; after clicking Save Children the third-child form disappeared, no error was shown, but the parent's registeredChildren array in localStorage only contained the two pre-existing children (amu, john). The Supabase dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> row therefore also only carries the two old children, so the manager Members list stays at 2 members and 'QAChild<n>' never appears.

React warning: 'Cannot update a component (ProfileTab) while rendering a different component (ChildDobPicker)'. patch() calls parent's onChange(iso) INSIDE its own setParts updater, which schedules a parent setState during our own state update — likely the reason the new child's dob value is lost between the UI patch and handleSaveChildren's closure read (filter isValidChildDob(c.dob) drops it). Move onChange(iso) OUT of the setParts updater (compose the ISO first, call setParts, then call onChange(iso)).

integration_issues.flow: Parent adds a new child via Profile > Registered children > Add another child > Save children -> Manager Members list
integration_issues.issue: New child never propagates to manager. Root cause is CLIENT-SIDE: the new child never even enters the parent's own persisted state (dlbc_players / registeredChildren), so it never gets pushed to dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid>, and therefore the manager's pullRemoteAppState+mergeContributionIntoPlayers has nothing new to merge. RLS is NOT the blocker for the new-child-add case — the bug is a UI/state bug in ProfileTab (see ChildDobPicker patch() closure issue).

action_items: P0: Fix ChildDobPicker.patch() so onChange(iso) is called OUTSIDE the setParts updater (see src/components/forms/BirthDateFields.tsx L137-144). This is the likely root cause of the newly added child being silently dropped in ProfileTab.handleSaveChildren.

P0: In ProfileTab.handleSaveChildren, when hasPartialChild is true or when filter drops rows, surface a user-visible error instead of silently succeeding — right now users click Save, see the form collapse, and assume it worked.

P1: Route dlbc_teams member writes through the contribution / manager-only path (or skip on non-managers) so the RLS warning on parent page load stops firing — mirroring what already happens for dlbc_players.
P2: Once the ChildDobPicker fix is in place, re-run this test end-to-end to confirm the newly added QAChild<n> shows up in the Manager Members list within 15s (on-mount + 12s aggregation).
critical_code_review_comments: ChildDobPicker.patch() calls parent onChange inside setParts updater — violates React state-during-render invariant and appears to cause the new-child DOB to be lost. This is the smoking gun for the reported bug.

handleSaveChildren silently filters out rows where isValidChildDob returns false (line 1398). Combined with the ChildDobPicker state bug this becomes a silent data-loss bug. At minimum, surface which child was rejected and why.

src/lib/clubData.ts syncKeyToRemote treats dlbc_players specially for members but not dlbc_teams — parent-session page loads still call ensureAppStateKeySynced(dlbc_teams) which the RLS correctly rejects, spamming the console.
src/pages/PlayerDashboard.tsx is 2133 lines — consider splitting ProfileTab / OnboardingScreen / helpers into their own files (over 700-line guideline).

success_rate.frontend: 50% (parent login/onboarding-list read works; add-new-child save is broken; manager login + Members list rendering works for existing rows)

test_credentials: Parent: cooler74.ea@gmail.com / test12 ; Manager: manager@dublinlions.ie / lions2025 (both worked). This parent account is already onboarded with children amu (2016-07-21) and john (2016-07-16).
seed_data_creation: Attempted to create child 'QAChild71841' (dob 2012-05-15, Male) via Profile > Registered children — save silently failed, so no seed data was actually persisted. Two earlier attempts (QAChild71404, QAChild71627) also failed silently the same way.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The parent account (cooler74.ea@gmail.com) already has 2 registered children (amu, john) which ARE visible on the manager Members list (Total Members = 2). This confirms the roster-contribution/aggregation pipeline works end-to-end for children that are already in state. The remaining bug is strictly UI-side: adding a THIRD child via Profile > Registered children > Add another child > Save Children drops the new child before it ever reaches localStorage. When retesting after the fix, add a child with UNIQUE name (e.g. QAChild<epoch>), wait 15s on the manager side, and expect Total Members to become 3 and the new name to appear in Members list. Also watch console for RLS warning on dlbc_teams (separate minor issue).
rca_of_the_issue: REPRODUCTION: 1) Login as parent cooler74.ea@gmail.com. 2) Click 'Manage children' (or navigate to Profile). 3) Click 'Add another child'. 4) Fill Name='QAChildX', click Year=2012, Month=May, type Day=15, Gender=Male. 5) UI correctly shows 'Age: 14 years old' for the new child. 6) Click 'Save children'. EXPECTED: parent.registeredChildren grows from 2 -> 3; dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> upserted in Supabase; manager Members list shows 3 rows within 15s. ACTUAL: form for Child 3 disappears with no error; parent.registeredChildren stays at 2 (amu, john); dlbc_players unchanged; manager Members list stays at 2. LIKELY ROOT CAUSE: ChildDobPicker.patch() at src/components/forms/BirthDateFields.tsx:137-144 calls parent's onChange(iso) inside setParts's updater function, which schedules a parent setState during React's state-update phase for ChildDobPicker itself. Combined with strict-mode/re-render timing this causes the newly-appended child's dob to be lost in ProfileTab.children before handleSaveChildren reads it, so isValidChildDob('') returns false and validChildren.filter drops the row. MITIGATION: refactor patch() to compute the iso value and call onChange OUTSIDE the setParts updater, and add a user-visible error when handleSaveChildren silently drops a row.
